description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof profile. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, one larger and one smaller, connected by a broad patio area. Large glass panels dominate the facade, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. A spacious swimming pool is integrated into the outdoor area, bordered by light-colored paving. The exterior materials appear to be a combination of concrete, glass, and metal, with a sleek, neutral color palette. The overall layout emphasizes open space, horizontal lines, and a strong connection to the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass panels, concrete surfaces, and an integrated swimming pool in a minimalist layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large glass panels, the expansive patio, and the swimming pool in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the pool, the smaller secondary structure, and the flat roof lines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the elongated main volume, the pool extending along the side, and the secondary structure at the far end.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, the connecting patio, and the clean, geometric lines of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in horizontal bands
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, wide glass doors, and no visible steps or decorative columns
